name: Three Cheese Vegetable Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups SARGENTO- Light Ricotta Cheese, (15 ounces)
10 Ounces Frozen Chopped Spinach, Thawed/Squeezed Dry
2 Tablespoons Sargento Fancy Supreme Shredded Parmesan,
1/2 Pound Lasagna Noodles, cooked according to
3/4 Cup SARGENTO Preferred Light Fancy Shredded, (3
3/4 Cup Mild Cheddar Cheese, divided (3 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large skillet with nonstick vegetable spray.
2. Add onion, garlic, and olive oil; cook over medium heat until tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Add tomato puree, tomatoes with liquid, mushrooms, zucchini, bell pepper, basil, salt, sugar, red pepper flakes, and oregano. Heat to a boil.
4. Reduce heat; cover and simmer 10 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
5. Combine Ricotta cheese, spinach, egg whites, and Parmesan cheese; mix well.
6. Spread 1 cup tomato sauce in bottom of a 13 x 9-inch baking dish.
7. Layer 3 lasagna noodles over the sauce.
8. Top with half of the Ricotta cheese mixture and 2 cups of remaining sauce.
9. Repeat layering with 3 more lasagna noodles, remaining Ricotta mixture, and 2 cups of sauce.
10. Combine Mozzarella and Cheddar cheeses. Sprinkle 3/4 cup cheese mixture over the sauce.
11. Top with remaining lasagna noodles and sauce.
12. Cover with foil; bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
13. Uncover; bake an additional 15 minutes.
14. Sprinkle with the remaining 3/4 cup cheese mixture.
15. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
Makes 10 servings
